segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Good morning, Clare House Hotel.
segments.zh: 早上好，克莱尔豪斯酒店。我是安德鲁，活动经理。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Andrew speaking.

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: I'm the Events Manager.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Good morning, Andrew.
segments.zh: 早上好，安德鲁。我叫萨曼莎。我正在为我父母的金婚纪念日筹备派对，打电话来咨询明年九月租用场地的事宜。另外，我父母和几位客人还需要住宿。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: My name's Samantha.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: I'm arranging a party for my parents' fiftieth wedding anniversary, and I'm ringing to ask about hiring a room some time next September.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Also my parents and several of the guests will need accommodation.

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: OK, I'm sure we can help you with that.
segments.zh: 好的，我们肯定能帮上忙。您想要坐席用餐还是自助餐？

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Will you be having a sit-down meal or a buffet?

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Probably a sit-down.
segments.zh: 大概是坐席吧。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: And do you know how many people there'll be?
segments.zh: 您知道大概有多少人吗？

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Around eighty, I think.
segments.zh: 我想大概八十人左右。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Well we have two rooms that can hold that number.
segments.zh: 我们有两个房间可以容纳那么多人。一个是阿德尔菲厅，可以坐85人，如果是自助餐站着的话可以容纳一百多人。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: One is the Adelphi Room.

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: That can seat eighty-five, or hold over a hundred if people are standing for a buffet.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: If you have live music, there's room for four or five musicians in the gallery overlooking the room.
segments.zh: 如果您有现场音乐，画廊里可以容纳四五位乐手，俯瞰整个房间。我们的客人通常喜欢音乐声既能跳舞，又不会太吵影响交谈。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Our guests usually appreciate the fact that the music can be loud enough for dancing, but not too loud for conversation.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Yes, I really don't like it when you can't talk.
segments.zh: 是的，我真的很不喜欢那种没法说话的情况。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Exactly.
segments.zh: 没错。阿德尔菲厅在酒店后面，有落地窗通向露台。每年那个时候，露台上会摆放着美丽的盆栽玫瑰。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Now the Adelphi Room is at the back of the hotel, and there are French windows leading out onto the terrace.

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: This has a beautiful display of pots of roses at that time of the year.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Which direction does it face?
segments.zh: 它朝哪个方向？

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Southwest, so that side of the hotel gets the sun in the afternoon and early evening.
segments.zh: 西南方向，所以酒店那侧在下午和傍晚能晒到太阳。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Very nice.
segments.zh: 很好。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: From the terrace you can see the area of trees within the grounds of the hotel, or you can stroll through there to the river – that's on the far side, so it isn't visible from the hotel.
segments.zh: 从露台可以看到酒店场地内的树林区域，或者您可以穿过那里走到河边——河在远处，所以从酒店是看不见的。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Then another option is the Carlton Room.
segments.zh: 另一个选择是卡尔顿厅。这个厅更大一些——最多可容纳110人——而且它有个优势是带舞台，如果你有娱乐活动的话会很方便，甚至一个小乐队也能在上面表演。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: This is a bit bigger – it can hold up to a hundred and ten people – and it has the advantage of a stage, which is useful if you have any entertainment, or indeed a small band can fit onto it.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: And can you go outside from the room?
segments.zh: 那从房间能到外面去吗？

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: No, the Carlton Room is on the first floor, but on one side the windows look out onto the lake.
segments.zh: 不行，卡尔顿厅在二楼，但有一侧的窗户能俯瞰湖面。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Lovely.
segments.zh: 真不错。我觉得这两个房间哪个都合适。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: I think either of those rooms would be suitable.

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Can I tell you about some of the options we offer in addition?
segments.zh: 我能再跟您说说我们提供的一些附加服务吗？

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Please do.
segments.zh: 请说吧。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: As well as a meal, you can have an MC, a Master of Ceremonies, who'll be with you throughout the party.
segments.zh: 除了餐食，您还可以请一位司仪，他会全程陪同您的派对。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: What exactly is the MC's function?
segments.zh: 司仪具体是做什么的？我想如果需要的话，他们会在用餐时致辞，是吗？

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: I suppose they make a speech during the meal if we need one, do they?

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。我们所有的司仪都受过公开演讲训练，所以很容易吸引大家的注意力——很多客人都很高兴有人能在嘈杂声中让自己被听到！而且他们也是你的后盾——如果出了什么差错，司仪会处理，这样你就可以放松了。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: All our MCs are trained as public speakers, so they can easily get people's attention – many guests are glad to have someone who can make themselves heard above the chatter!

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: And they're also your support – if anything goes wrong, the MC will deal with it, so you can relax.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Great!
segments.zh: 太好了！我需要问问你关于食物的事，但另一件重要的事是住宿。你们酒店里显然有房间，但你们还有其他住宿吗，比如小木屋？

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: I'll need to ask you about food, but something else that's important is accommodation.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: You obviously have rooms in the hotel, but do you also have any other accommodation, like cabins, for example?

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Yes, there are five in the grounds, all self-contained.
segments.zh: 有的，场地里有五间，都是独立式的。每间可住两到四人，有自己的客厅、浴室和小厨房。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: They each sleep two to four people and have their own living room, bathroom and small kitchen.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: That sounds perfect for what we'll need.
segments.zh: 听起来很适合我们的需求。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Now you have various facilities, don't you?
segments.zh: 你们有各种设施，对吧？它们都包含在租用房间的费用里吗？比如游泳池。

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Are they all included in the price of hiring the room?

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: The pool, for instance.

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: Normally you'll be able to use it, but it'll be closed throughout September for refurbishment, I'm afraid.
segments.zh: 通常你可以使用，但恐怕整个九月都会关闭进行翻新。不过健身房可以使用，而且不额外收费。健身房全天开放，从早上六点到午夜。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: The gym will be available, though, at no extra charge.

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: That's open all day, from six in the morning until midnight.

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: And the tennis courts, but there is a small additional payment for those.
segments.zh: 还有网球场，但使用它们需要支付少量额外费用。我们有四个球场，如果可能的话，最好提前预订，因为排队等候的人可能很多！

segments.speaker: ANDREW
segments.en: We have four courts, and it's worth booking in advance if you possibly can, as there can be quite a long waiting list for them!

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的，现在我们可以讨论一下食物吗？晚餐大约在七点钟……

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: Now could we discuss the food?

segments.speaker: SAM
segments.en: This would be dinner, around seven o'clock ...

items.prompt: Enquiry about booking hotel room for event. Andrew is the ________ Manager.

pairs.p: rooms that can hold that number
pairs.note: 题干说预订酒店房间办活动，原文说房间能容纳那个数字，意思相同。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问 Andrew 是什么经理，但定位句提到 Adelphi Room 可坐 85 人，答案 85 来自数字，需注意题干中的 Manager 是干扰，实际答案在数字部分。

items.prompt: Adelphi Room: can go out and see the ________ in pots on the terrace

pairs.note: 原文中'pots of roses'对应题干'pots'后的空格，答案就是roses。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'pots of roses'，题干中'see the ________ in pots'，所以空格填roses。

items.prompt: Adelphi Room: terrace has a view of a group of ________

pairs.note: 题干说'看到一组...的景色'，原文说'看到...的区域'，意思相同。
答案词'trees'在原文中直接出现，但题干加了'group of'，原文用'area of'修饰。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句开头'From the terrace you can see...'与题干'terrace has a view of'对应，后面'area of trees'就是答案。

pairs.note: 原文用'has the advantage of a'替换了题干中的'has a'，表示拥有某物。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问Carlton Room有什么，原文说它有a stage，通过'has the advantage of a'定位到'stage'。

items.prompt: Master of Ceremonies: can give a ________ while people are eating

pairs.note: give a speech 和 make a speech 同义，都表示发表演讲。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问 MC 可以在人们吃饭时做什么，定位句提到 MC 在用餐期间发表演讲，因此答案应为 speech。

items.prompt: Master of Ceremonies: will provide ________ if there are any problems

pairs.note: 题干中的provide与原文中的your support对应，表示提供支持。
题干中的if there are any problems与原文中的if anything goes wrong同义，表示如果出现问题。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干中的'provide'和'if there are any problems'定位到原文中的'your support'和'if anything goes wrong'，从而找到答案support。

pairs.note: 题干用hotel rooms，原文用rooms in the hotel，意思相同但语序不同。

pairs.p: but do you also have any other accommodation, like
pairs.note: 题干用or连接选项，原文用but do you also have any other accommodation, like引出并列选项。
题干和原文完全一致，直接定位答案。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问住宿类型，原文先提到hotel rooms，然后用but do you also have any other accommodation, like引出另一种住宿cabins，因此答案就是cabins。

items.prompt: What is said about using the outdoor swimming pool?

pairs.note: 题干中的'using the outdoor swimming pool'在原文中被简化为'use it'，'it'指代前文提到的'outdoor swimming pool'。
题干问'关于...说了什么'，原文用'Normally you'll be able to'引出信息，表示通常情况。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'Normally you'll be able to use it'，对应题干问的'using the outdoor swimming pool'，但后面说'closed throughout September'，所以答案选C（有使用限制）。

items.prompt: What is said about using the gym?

pairs.note: 题干'using the gym'对应原文'use it'，it指代gym。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问关于使用健身房的信息，定位句直接说'you'll be able to use it'，但后面提到九月关闭，所以答案A（有使用限制）正确。

items.prompt: What is said about using the tennis courts?

pairs.note: 题干中的'payment'对应原文的'small additional payment'，表示需要额外付费。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问关于使用网球场的情况，定位句直接提到'using the tennis courts'，并说明需要额外付费。
